summary: Completed iteration 2 testing - All features working. Backend: 15/15 tests pass (100%). Frontend: Order flow, review image upload, order tracking timeline, search, category filters, hero carousel all functional.

minor.issue: Console warning in AuthPage: 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component' - minor React warning, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: React console warning in AuthPage about setState during render - not critical but should be addressed
All requested features are working correctly
seed_data_creation: Created test order via API for order testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 2 features verified working: 1) POST /api/orders creates orders with stock decrement 2) GET /api/my-orders returns user orders 3) POST /api/reviews/upload-image handles JPEG/PNG/WebP up to 5MB 4) Product reviews support photos array 5) GET /api/products/filter/advanced?search=X works 6) /shop?category=dattes pre-selects category 7) Workers running (stock_alerts, recommendations, review_reminders) 8) MyOrders page shows order list with mini timeline and order detail with full tracking timeline

order_creation.details: POST /api/orders creates order, decrements variant stock, returns order with order_number

my_orders_api.details: GET /api/my-orders requires auth, returns user orders sorted by created_at desc

my_orders_frontend.details: Orders list shows order cards with mini timeline, clicking shows detail view with full OrderTimeline component

review_image_upload.details: POST /api/reviews/upload-image accepts JPEG/PNG/WebP, enforces 5MB limit, requires auth

product_reviews_with_photos.details: Review form shows 'Photos (max 4)' section with camera icon upload button

shop_category_url_param.details: /shop?category=dattes pre-selects Dattes category button (amber styling, scale effect)

shop_search_bar.details: Search bar filters products, shows 'Recherche: X' tag with X button to clear

hero_carousel.details: HeroSlider shows 4 slides with navigation arrows and dot indicators, auto-play enabled

workers.details: worker_stock_alerts, worker_recommendations, worker_review_reminders all RUNNING in supervisor
